Also featured is the remarkable story of the capture and transport of whale sharks to the Georgia Aquarium in Atlanta.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: With the first episode of season three of Surviving Mann in the books, it’s time to dissect and analyze. Contestant and three-time olympian Lanny Barnes recounts the first day under Coach Mann and how it stacks up to his training in the past.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A group of 5 All Star contestants were chosen to embark on an adventure overseas, but what they didn’t know is that it would become a maritime mission. Radio Host Kerri Kasem and rockstar Ashba join Don as he breaks the news to the contestants that there’s more to this yacht than a pleasure cruise. If they thought that this trip was going to be smooth sailing, they soon realized how mistaken they were when Don hit them with the hardest physical evolution in Surviving Mann’s history.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: When the CIA calls, the All-Stars answer. The team is tasked with sabotaging a drug-smuggling boat before it can make its shipment. With mission success hanging in the balance, the All-Stars take their training up a notch, starting with a lesson in maritime navigation. From there, the contestants practice their tactical cast and turtleback swimming, but things take a turn when the contestants partake in a mile race against the current. Who will win and prove their water proficiency?

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s go time. The mission day has come and the All-Stars have to rendezvous on a nearby island to pick up their supplies. When it comes to gear, Don pulls out all the stops to ensure mission success. From water jets and state-of-the-art fins to maximize speed, to finding a creative way to keep his team lethally armed without breaking any laws.. Don has a few surprises in store for the All-Stars.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a successful mission under their belts, the team of All-Stars can relax and enjoy a day of diving.. or so they thought. The CIA is calling the team back into action for a VBSS mission to secure deadly poisons that are inbound for civilians. If the team thought the previous mission was challenging, this one makes it look like a cake walk. The All-Stars must call upon all their training thus far to make it through this mission, when an unknown element threatens to jeopardize it and them.

programme.title: Journey Through Glacier National Park
programme.desc: Embark on a breathtaking "Journey Through Glacier National Park" in our newest release. Enjoy a serene visual escape into one of America’s most stunning National Parks. This immersive nature film captures the park’s majestic snowy mountains, shimmering glacial lakes, and crystal-clear rivers in stunning detail. Encounter native wildlife in their natural habitats and wander through alpine meadows blooming with vibrant wildflowers. Let the sights and sounds of Glacier National Park renew your spirit and connect you to the wild beauty of the natural world. The full 90 minute film is available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: Journey Along the Oregon Coast
programme.desc: Experience spectacular coastal landscapes in "Journey Along the Oregon Coast". See dramatic sea stacks illuminated by colorful skies, pristine beaches, spring wildflowers, and even watch a Roosevelt elk gallop along Canon Beach! This relaxing and exhilarating film is accompanied by the soothing sounds of ocean waves & birdsongs. This film is 85 minutes in length and available to subscribers of www.NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: Autumn's Grace: The Wasatch Mountains
programme.desc: The Wasatch mountains of Utah display natures finest autumn colors. The stunning spectrum of the landscape ranges from dark reds to bright yellows, splashed across the mountains in exuberant splendor. A soothing acoustic soundtrack accompanies the scenery, filmed from above and within the autumn paradise of the Wasatch mountains. Run time approx. 1 hour 50 minutes.

programme.title: Preview for "Alaska" Art Display Film
programme.desc: This is a preview for the 1 hour long Art Display Film "Alaska". Journey into the beautiful wilderness of Alaska through the photography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel. This art display film showcases their most stunning photographs of Americas last great wilderness - from breaching whales and misty mountains of the Inside Passage to the Grizzlies and soaring peaks of Denali National Park. This 60 minute film will give you new appreciation for the wilderness of the wild North. Accompanied by a beautiful acoustic guitar soundtrack. To see the full film please subscribe to NatureStream.tv Streaming Channel, with free apps for all streaming devices, at www.NatureStream.tv

programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Land Of Teranga | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 1
programme.desc: Sam Bleakley starts his journey through Senegal joined by Irish big wave surfer Easkey Britton and French pro Adrien Toyon. Their first stop is N'Gor Island, where they ride the wave seen in the opening sequence of "Endless Summer." On the island, they learn about Teranga, the Senegalese quality of hospitality, sharing, and welcomeness. They also meet up with Marta Imarisio, who has helped inspire the country's women and girls to get into surfing.

programme.title: Trans-Saharan Highway | Brilliant Corners: Algeria, Episode 3

Back in Algiers, Sam, Erwan, and Dihya visit one of the country's leading digital agencies to discuss their journey and go for one last surf in some perfect longboard waves. Before leaving the country, Sam and Erwan talk with local surfers Dihya and Walid about the future of surfing in Algeria and how the emergence of the sport could impact the people there.
